attacking_style: Opportunistic sprinter who capitalizes on reduced bunch scenarios created by crosswinds and selective racing rather than traditional mass gallops.
team_tactics: NTT showed improved team cohesion in 2020, keeping Cimolai protected and positioned through decisive crosswind splits in final 30km.
terrain_preference: Windy, technical stages that fragment the peloton and eliminate pure power sprinters; thrives when bunch is reduced to 10-20 riders rather than full field sprints.
vulnerability: Likely struggles in mass field sprints against pure power sprinters; needs selective racing conditions to compete for wins.
key_patterns: Wins from small reduced groups after late-race selection (13-rider group, 30km from finish).
Benefits from NTT team development step-change in 2020 versus previous seasons.
Executes sprint finishes when protected through technical/windy finale rather than positioning battles.
form_trajectory: positive: Part of NTT team performance surge in early 2020, already exceeding previous year's total wins by March
